---
title: "About Me"
---

<div class="home-layout">
<div class="home-photo">
<img src="https://haiyangz.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/haiyang-zhang-hbs-resize-square.jpg?w=1200" alt="Haiyang Zhang" class="home-headshot" />
</div>

<div class="home-text">

I am a doctoral candidate in the Strategy unit at Harvard Business School.

I am interested in corporate and competitive strategy. My current research examines entry and competition in infrastructure sectors, especially settings where ownership and regulation shape how firms compete. My work is informed and inspired by my experience as a McKinsey consultant and as a market designer in the energy market.

Outside work, I enjoy [flying](/flying/) a Cessna 172. Flying W (N14) is my home airport. Cape May (WWD) is one of my favorite destinations.

</div>
</div>

<p class="cv-note">A current copy of my CV is available <a href="/cv/">here</a>.</p>

<div class="social-buttons" aria-label="External profiles">
  <a class="social-button" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&view_op=list_works&gmla=AJsN-F7yto0lZfQscyE9yftidDQy_faFqy_jMkp9Vt5Fd1pu_ye8IFZaZPak_8UnL_e7Vle5fzFLiehIs8kz115FiA9sCYGP7w&user=-puXLeYAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar</a>
  <a class="social-button" href="https://github.com/haiyzhang" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a>
  <a class="social-button" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/haiyang-zhang/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a>
</div>
